rwa_general.issuer: Arcton (Zurich-based Swiss fintech); each offering is issued by the underlying existing Swiss company whose shares are tokenized
rwa_general.jurisdiction: Switzerland (Swiss DLT Act; shares entered in the Swiss Commercial Register)
rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Tokenized shares issued under the Swiss DLT Act (in force 2021) with notarial approval and Swiss Commercial Register entry; no securities-regulator license verified
rwa_general.redemptionModel: No issuer redemption; investors exit via permissionless secondary trading of share tokens on Camelot (Arbitrum)

institutionalGated.kycModel: KYC/AML required to participate; failure to complete KYC can limit participation or fund withdrawals
institutionalGated.accessModel: KYC-gated public offering open to retail investors (self-described as democratizing startup equity); no accredited/qualified-investor requirement verified
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: None found post-IPO; share tokens trade permissionlessly 24/7 on Camelot without lock-ups

rwa_general.redemptionModel: Full-reserve 1:1 redemption to underlying fiat, reliant on ARYZE BVI and its custodial banking relationships

institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned B2B infrastructure for licensed issuers: builders deploy on a self-serve layer under their own or a partner licence; banks and regulated institutions use it as a managed service with ARYZE as infrastructure provider

rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: KYC/identity verification required per applicable regulation; compliance enforced at token level via Stobox STV3; no specific securities registration or regulator disclosed.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: Funds held in escrow until a campaign's funding target is met (auto-refund if not reached); returns paid from ticket revenue, with debt-model campaigns repaying principal plus fixed interest ~1 week after the event.

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Live-event ticket-sales revenue (per-campaign revenue share or event-linked debt interest).
yieldBearing.distributionModel: Per-event payout: revenue-share slice of ticket sales, or debt principal plus fixed interest repaid roughly one week after the event.
yieldBearing.underlyingInstrument: Tokenized event-revenue positions issued via Stobox STV3 (ERC-20, Arbitrum One).

rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Tokenized securities under per-pool SPV structures with KYC/AML via Securitize; funds offered to accredited/professional non-US investors (Reg S)
rwa_general.redemptionModel: Per-pool subscription and redemption at NAV, subject to fund liquidity and lock-up terms
rwa_general.auditHistory: Audited by Cantina (2025), 0xMacro (2025) and earlier by SRLabs and Trail of Bits

institutionalGated.kycModel: KYC/AML and accredited/qualified-investor verification via Securitize ID
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned allowlist; funds offered to accredited investors and non-US persons under Reg S
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: Tranche and fund tokens transferable only between KYC-verified, allowlisted wallets

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Interest from tokenized private credit, US Treasury bills and AAA CLO holdings
yieldBearing.underlyingInstrument: DROP/TIN pool tranches plus tokenized funds (JTRSY short-term US T-bills, JAAA AAA CLOs)

rwa_general.issuer: Chateau Capital Corp (Panama), with asset SPVs organized in Panama, BVI, or another compliant jurisdiction
rwa_general.jurisdiction: Panama (governed by the laws of the Republic of Panama)
rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Offerings limited to non-U.S. persons under Regulation S of the U.S. Securities Act of 1933; not a registered/regulated fund. Access gated by KYC/AML and OFAC screening.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: On-chain mint/redeem of chUSD against approved stablecoin collateral (USDC/USDT); collateral moved manually between BitGo custody and mint/redeem contracts, capped at $100,000 per block; direct mint/redeem restricted to approved KYC/KYB market-maker counterparties.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Zellic audit completed 2024-02-11 (3 critical, 1 medium, 2 informational findings, all reported fixed).

institutionalGated.kycModel: Mandatory KYC/AML for all platform participants; direct chUSD mint/redemption additionally requires KYC/KYB clearance as an approved market-maker counterparty; all operations OFAC/sanctions-screened.
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned, non-U.S.-only access under Regulation S (verified eligible non-U.S. investors)
eligibleJurisdictions: Non-U.S. persons (as defined under Regulation S); U.S. persons excluded
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: Participation and offerings expressly limited to verified non-U.S. persons under Regulation S; U.S. persons excluded and OFAC/sanctioned addresses blacklisted.

rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: KYC/AML-gated borrowers; permissionless lender side on Dynamic pools, whitelisted institutions on Prime (compliance via SecuritizeID).
rwa_general.redemptionModel: Lenders hold ERC-20 cpTokens minted 1:1 on deposit and redeem them to withdraw principal plus block-accrued interest, subject to available pool liquidity.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Audited by CertiK (Mar 2022), Pessimistic (Mar 2022) and Hacken (Prime, Jan 2025); grounding also cites PeckShield and ChainSecurity.

institutionalGated.kycModel: KYC/KYB and AML verification via SecuritizeID (Securitize) for Prime; institutional borrowers whitelisted on all products.
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned invite-only whitelist for Prime lenders and borrowers; Dynamic pools have a permissionless lender side over KYC'd institutional borrowers.
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: Prime access limited to whitelisted institutions invited to specific borrower pools; participation bounded by pool terms and supply windows.

multiChain.bridgeModel: Native per-chain deployment with chain-exclusive borrower pools; the CPOOL token is bridged across chains via the LayerZero Omnichain Fungible Token (OFT) standard.

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Interest paid by whitelisted institutional borrowers on uncollateralized loans; cpUSD yield is tied to Credit Vault returns.
yieldBearing.distributionModel: Interest accrues every block into cpToken value, redeemed on withdrawal (accrual model).
yieldBearing.underlyingInstrument: Uncollateralized institutional loans (single-borrower pools and borrower-managed Credit Vaults).

rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: SEC-registered broker-dealer (Dinari Securities LLC, file no. 8-71215; FINRA/SIPC member) and registered transfer agent issuing dShares.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: dShares are backed 1:1 by underlying US securities held in custody by a registered US broker-dealer; holders can mint and redeem against the underlying shares.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Smart contracts (sbt-contracts) audited by Hacken (Dec 2024 and Dec 2023).

institutionalGated.kycModel: Mandatory KYC/KYB before a wallet can hold or trade dShares; US users complete accredited-investor verification, non-US users complete standard KYC.
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned allowlist enforced on-chain via TransferRestrictor contracts; US access under Rule 506(c) accredited-investor rules, non-US retail across 85+ jurisdictions.
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: On-chain whitelist/blacklist via TransferRestrictor contracts blocks transfers to non-KYC or geographically restricted wallets, so dShares cannot trade freely on open DEXs.

multiChain.bridgeModel: Cross-chain expansion of dShares via LayerZero interoperability; Dinari also operates the Avalanche-based Dinari Financial Network L1 as an omni-chain orderbook to unify liquidity and settlement across chains.

rwa_general.redemptionModel: Async ERC-4626 / ERC-7540 vault; redemptions settle within 30 days, with 20-70% of TVL held liquid in early stages to service withdrawals.

institutionalGated.kycModel: Standard KYC/AML wallet onboarding flow (described by the issuer as not an accreditation gate).
institutionalGated.accessModel: Jurisdiction-gated: open to participants in supported jurisdictions only; US persons and unsupported jurisdictions excluded.

rwa_general.redemptionModel: No direct redemption; exit intended via a planned on-chain secondary marketplace for whitelisted holders (marked 'coming soon')

realWorldCustody.custodyModel: Property title held off-chain by a per-property legally compliant trust that owns the asset on behalf of token holders; investors self-custody their property tokens via their own wallet private keys.
realWorldCustody.reserveComposition: Each token is backed by a specific physical property (single-property offerings), not a pooled reserve.

institutionalGated.kycModel: KYC provided by Persona; approved addresses are added to an on-chain whitelist before they can purchase or hold tokens.
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned whitelist enforced via a Polymath ST-20 GeneralTransferManager module; only KYC-verified, whitelisted wallets may hold or receive tokens.
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: On-chain transfer control via GeneralTransferManager restricts transfers to whitelisted (KYC-approved) addresses only; non-whitelisted transfers are blocked.

rwa_general.issuer: Florence Finance (DMCC-registered LLC, Dubai) with administration via Florence Finance Europe BV (Netherlands)
rwa_general.jurisdiction: United Arab Emirates (DMCC free zone, Dubai); operations administered from the Netherlands
rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Unregulated; per docs, not currently subject to financial or banking regulation in Dubai or the EU, as it focuses on B2B lending and crypto-denominated instruments
rwa_general.redemptionModel: flrEUR intended to redeem 1:1 for EUR via the protocol Treasury from loan repayments; no guaranteed redemption while funds remain deployed within the pool mandate, otherwise reliant on secondary DEX liquidity
rwa_general.auditHistory: Smart contracts audited per official docs; specific audit firms and dates not disclosed in public documentation

institutionalGated.kycModel: KYC/AML onboarding required for Primary Funders before their address is whitelisted
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned allowlist (whitelisted public keys) for Primary Funders who have completed KYC/AML

rwa_general.issuer: Goldfinch Foundation / Warbler Labs (Goldfinch Prime managed by Heron Finance)
rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Reg D / Reg S exempt offerings; Goldfinch Prime restricted to non-U.S. persons. Protocol is winding down into maintenance mode following governance proposal GIP-87 (June 2026).
rwa_general.redemptionModel: LP tokens (FIDU senior pool, GPRIME) redeemable subject to pool liquidity; withdrawals currently constrained amid wind-down and borrower defaults.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Multiple audits by Certik (2020-2021) and Trail of Bits (2021).

institutionalGated.kycModel: KYC/AML required; Backers and investors must complete identity verification via the protocol's compliance flow.
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned; Reg D / Reg S exempt offerings, with Goldfinch Prime restricted to non-U.S. persons.
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: Securities-law transfer restrictions apply to exempt offerings; access is permissioned to verified, eligible participants.

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Interest from real-world private-credit loans (originally EM business loans; Goldfinch Prime via major private-credit managers such as Apollo, Ares, Golub).
yieldBearing.distributionModel: Accrual to NAV; FIDU senior-pool token price drifts up as interest accrues.
yieldBearing.underlyingInstrument: USDC loans to real-world borrowers and tokenized exposure to private-credit funds.

rwa_general.issuer: Lofty AI, Inc. (per-property Wyoming DAO LLCs)
rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Each property is offered under Reg D 506(c) as a US LLC membership interest; Lofty AI, Inc. acts as the initial (removable) manager.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: No direct redemption; holders exit via Lofty's on-platform secondary marketplace using a Proactive Market Maker (PMM) and liquidity pools.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Reviewed by the Algorand Foundation as a flagship RWA case study; no third-party financial audit of reserves is publicly disclosed.

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Net rental income from the underlying US residential properties (secondary sources cite roughly 6-10% annual gross rental yield, varying by property).
yieldBearing.distributionModel: Daily distribution of net rent, proportional to token ownership, paid in USDC (USDCa) on Algorand.
yieldBearing.underlyingInstrument: Fractional membership interest in a per-property US LLC that owns a single-family rental home.

realWorldCustody.custodyModel: Each property's deed is held by a dedicated per-property Wyoming DAO LLC; token holders are the LLC members and Lofty AI, Inc. serves as the initial, holder-removable manager. Lofty also auto-creates and custodies managed Algorand wallets for users.
realWorldCustody.reserveComposition: Each property LLC maintains an operating reserve for unexpected repairs; there is no pooled financial reserve backing token value.

rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Bermuda Monetary Authority Digital Asset Business Act license (Class M) #202302512; USDM wound down and primary market closed August 2025.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: KYC'd primary users redeemed 1:1 via USDC with T+1 to T+2 settlement (minimum $100,000); primary market closed August 22, 2025 under an orderly wind-down.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Monthly third-party reserve attestations (Accountant Reports) by Nephos Group, plus yearly financial audits reviewing USDM Reserves.

institutionalGated.kycModel: KYC-verified primary users access minting/redemption directly via Mountain Protocol portal and API.
institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned primary market (KYC required); USDM freely transferable on-chain to non-KYC secondary holders.
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: No on-chain transfer restrictions on USDM; only primary mint/redeem is gated to KYC'd users.

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Interest on short-duration US Treasuries (average duration 60 days or less) held in reserves.
yieldBearing.distributionModel: Daily rebasing (balances increase at 14:00 UTC by accrued yield).

realWorldCustody.custodyModel: Reserves held 1:1 in bankruptcy-remote, customer-segregated accounts with regulated custodians and insured banks under Bermuda DABA.
realWorldCustody.reserveComposition: Short-duration US Treasuries plus dollar deposits at insured banks.

rwa_general.issuer: Ondo Finance, Inc. (product issuers: Ondo USDY LLC for USDY; Ondo I LP / OUSG vehicle for OUSG)
rwa_general.jurisdiction: United States (Delaware entities); USDY offered under Reg S to non-US persons, OUSG under Rule 506(c)/3(c)(7)
rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Securities offered under US exemptions: USDY via Regulation S (non-US persons); OUSG via Rule 506(c) / Section 3(c)(7) to accredited investors and qualified purchasers. Not a registered investment company.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: 24/7 on-chain mint/redeem; OUSG supports instant USDC subscription/redemption via a smart-contract gateway ($5K instant min) plus non-instant wire (min $100K invest / $50K redeem). USDY mint/redeem against USD.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Multiple smart-contract audits: Halborn (Feb 2025, Jun 2024), Cyfrin (Jul 2025, Apr 2024), Code4rena (Apr 2024, Sep 2023, Jan 2023), Zokyo (Aug 2023), Nethermind (Apr 2023). Index at docs.ondo.finance/audits.

institutionalGated.kycModel: Mandatory KYC/AML onboarding to Ondo's Qualified-Access / eligible-investor program; wallets are whitelisted before mint/redeem.
institutionalGated.accessModel: OUSG: permissioned allowlist under Rule 506(c)/3(c)(7) (accredited investors + qualified purchasers). USDY: Regulation S allowlist restricted to non-US persons.
eligibleJurisdictions: United States accredited investors / qualified purchasers (OUSG)
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: On-chain transfers limited to whitelisted, KYC-approved addresses; USDY carries a post-mint transfer lockup and Reg S resale restrictions.

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Short-term US Treasury yields plus blended interest on insured bank deposits (USDY, ~4.65% APY reported Apr 2026); OUSG tracks a BlackRock short-term Treasury / money-market portfolio.
yieldBearing.distributionModel: Accrual to NAV / token price (USDY price rises daily); rebasing variant rUSDY holds $1 with growing balance. OUSG accrues to token value.
yieldBearing.underlyingInstrument: Short-term US Treasuries and US-insured bank deposits (USDY); BlackRock BUIDL, BlackRock FedFund (TFDXX), bank deposits and USDC liquidity (OUSG).

realWorldCustody.custodyModel: Off-chain reserves held by a Delaware bankruptcy-remote vehicle (Ondo USDY LLC); Treasuries in cash-custody accounts at regulated broker-dealers, deposits at insured banks. OUSG reserves held largely in BlackRock BUIDL.
realWorldCustody.reserveComposition: USDY targets ~65% US-insured bank deposits and ~35% short-term US Treasuries; OUSG portfolio is majority BlackRock BUIDL with TFDXX, bank deposits and USDC.

multiChain.bridgeModel: Native issuance across supported chains (USDY: Ethereum, Solana, Mantle, Sui, Aptos; OUSG: Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, Sui, Mantle).

rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Self-described licensed precious-metals enterprise based in Hong Kong; specific regulator/license not disclosed.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: Physical redemption of PGOLD for allocated gold bars of nearly any size in Hong Kong, with planned expansion across APAC and Dubai.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Reserve attestations offered monthly (standard) or weekly (premium); independent third-party audits described as optional/quarterly. No attestation or audit firm named.

realWorldCustody.custodyModel: Allocated/segregated physical gold held in institutional vaults; PGOLD minted 1:1 against certified reserves with linkage to physical bars (serials, fineness, vault).
realWorldCustody.reserveComposition: LBMA-certified physical gold at 99.99% fineness (gold only today; silver/platinum families flagged as possible future additions).

rwa_general.issuer: RealToken Inc. (Managing Member) via per-property RealToken LLC series, Delaware
rwa_general.jurisdiction: United States (Delaware LLC; Reg D Rule 506(c) / Reg S offerings)
rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Unregistered securities offered under Reg D Rule 506(c) (US accredited investors) and Reg S (offshore); per-property Delaware LLC; KYC/AML required. RealToken Inc. is not a registered broker-dealer or investment advisor.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: No issuer redemption; secondary exit via permissioned YAM peer-to-peer market (per-property whitelisting) and thin DEX liquidity.
rwa_general.auditHistory: Property-level legal opinions per series; on-chain smart-contract audits by Hexens; no published third-party proof-of-reserves attestation.

yieldBearing.yieldSource: Net rental income from tenanted US single-family and commercial properties (2% of gross retained by RealT, ~98% distributed to holders).
yieldBearing.distributionModel: Weekly rental distribution paid in stablecoins (USDC or xDai), primarily on Gnosis Chain.
yieldBearing.underlyingInstrument: Fractional LLC membership interests in individual income-producing US real estate properties (per-property ERC-20 RealTokens).

realWorldCustody.custodyModel: Per-property Delaware LLC (series) holds legal title; property deeds custodied off-chain by the LLC / RealToken Inc.; token holders own LLC membership interests rather than the deed directly.
realWorldCustody.reserveComposition: Physical US residential and commercial real estate (concentrated in Detroit and other US markets).

multiChain.bridgeModel: Native per-chain ERC-20 issuance; Gnosis Chain (xDai) used as primary low-fee chain for weekly rental distributions, with Ethereum deployment for the original issuance layer.

rwa_general.redemptionModel: Fund-level redemption processed via Securitize as transfer agent; underlying-fund terms apply (e.g. daily/at-NAV for BUIDL money-market; interval-fund limits for ACRED private credit).

institutionalGated.accessModel: Permissioned allowlist (Reg D Rule 506(c)); DSToken enforces whitelist, lockups and jurisdictional limits on-chain.
institutionalGated.transferRestrictions: Transfers restricted to allowlisted, verified wallets only; DS Protocol compliance layer blocks transfers to non-whitelisted addresses.

rwa_general.regulatoryStatus: Registered money services business under FinCEN; partner stablecoins issued via regulated trust companies. No securities/RWA-specific regulatory approval verified.
rwa_general.redemptionModel: 1:1 fiat mint/redemption via Stably Prime custodial accounts; VeUSD redeemed for USD within 1 business day during US banking hours.

realWorldCustody.custodyModel: Partner-issued custodial model: fiat reserves held by a regulated trustee (Prime Trust) via Stably Prime custodial accounts; USD deposited across custodian banks syndicated through Reich & Tang Deposit Networks.
